_meta.purpose: Complete landing page design prompt for Second Brain. ADDITIVE to globals.css — do not redefine any token already there: --background, --foreground, --primary:#c70036, --radius:0.45rem, --border, --card, --font-sans:Geist Mono, .dark mode class, shadcn New York style, @theme inline. This file covers ONLY what globals.css does not: visual effects layer, layout specs, component specs, animation patterns, page structure.
_meta.inspiration: Dark AI SaaS landing page (Mufi style, Dribbble). Key traits: near-black background; a central glowing 3D orb (crimson core bleeding to purple/blue) as the recurring ambient light source; large bold white headlines with 1-2 gradient-highlighted words per section (crimson→orange); dark glass UI-mockup cards in asymmetric grids; gradient pill CTA buttons; greyscale integration logos row; platform pill-tab switcher; shadcn accordion FAQ; full-width CTA banner with rotating conic-gradient border glow; multi-column footer.

project.name: Second Brain
project.ui_library: shadcn/ui New York style — already installed
project.styling: Tailwind CSS v4.2 — @theme inline already in globals.css

existing_project_structure._note: This is the EXACT directory tree from the project screenshot. Only create files in these locations. Do not add new top-level folders.

app.globals.css: EXISTS — do NOT recreate. Only append new tokens at the bottom.
app.layout.tsx: Modify: add dark class to html, import ThemeProvider (already exists), add CursorDot, add Navbar
app.page.tsx: Modify: import all sections and compose them in order

components.ui/: shadcn components live here. Also place ALL custom UI primitives here — do NOT create subfolders.

hooks.use-in-view.ts: CREATE: thin wrapper around motion-react useInView

lib.motion-variants.ts: CREATE: all shared Framer Motion variant objects
lib.page-data.ts: CREATE: all static content arrays (nav, integrations, features, agents, faq, footer)

public._note: Place SVG icons or OG image here. Orb is pure CSS — no image assets needed.

do_not_create: components/sections/ folder — keep sections inline in page.tsx or as exports from components/ui/
components/layout/ folder — Navbar and Footer go in components/ui/

additive_css._note: APPEND everything below to the bottom of globals.css. Nothing here conflicts with existing tokens.

new_keyframes.pulse-dot: @keyframes pulse-dot { 0%,100% { opacity:1; box-shadow:0 0 0 0 var(--brand-glow-strong); } 50% { opacity:0.6; box-shadow:0 0 0 6px transparent; } }
new_keyframes.fade-up: @keyframes fade-up { from { opacity:0; transform:translateY(24px); } to { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0); } }
new_keyframes.shimmer: @keyframes shimmer { from { background-position:-200% center; } to { background-position:200% center; } }
new_keyframes.scan-line: @keyframes scan-line { 0% { transform:translateY(-100%); opacity:0; } 20%,80% { opacity:1; } 100% { transform:translateY(400%); opacity:0; } }

design_tokens._note: Use these values consistently. They reference existing globals.css vars + the new additive vars above.

ambient_orb_component.type: Server Component (pure CSS — no hooks needed)
ambient_orb_component.description: The single most important visual element in this design. A floating layered CSS orb with crimson core bleeding outward through purple into dark navy. Appears in 4 places: Hero (behind mockup cards), Features (centered between columns), Professionals (behind device mockup), CTA Banner. NO canvas, NO Three.js — pure CSS radial-gradients with blur filters.

implementation.structure: A div container with 4 absolutely-stacked child divs, each a circle with a radial-gradient and blur filter
implementation.layer_1_core: width:120px; height:120px; border-radius:50%; background:radial-gradient(circle, rgba(255,50,80,0.95) 0%, rgba(199,0,54,0.75) 40%, transparent 70%); filter:blur(3px); position:absolute; top:50%; left:50%; transform:translate(-50%,-50%)
implementation.layer_2_bloom: width:300px; height:300px; border-radius:50%; background:radial-gradient(circle, rgba(199,0,54,0.55) 0%, rgba(140,0,100,0.30) 45%, transparent 70%); filter:blur(24px); position:absolute; top:50%; left:50%; transform:translate(-50%,-50%)
implementation.layer_3_halo: width:500px; height:500px; border-radius:50%; background:radial-gradient(circle, rgba(100,0,130,0.30) 0%, rgba(60,10,140,0.18) 50%, transparent 70%); filter:blur(48px); position:absolute; top:50%; left:50%; transform:translate(-50%,-50%)
implementation.layer_4_atmosphere: width:740px; height:740px; border-radius:50%; background:radial-gradient(circle, rgba(40,10,100,0.20) 0%, rgba(20,5,60,0.08) 60%, transparent 100%); filter:blur(72px); position:absolute; top:50%; left:50%; transform:translate(-50%,-50%)
implementation.container: position:absolute; pointer-events:none; z-index:0; animation: orb-drift 6s ease-in-out infinite, orb-pulse 4s ease-in-out infinite

props.size: 'sm'|'md'|'lg'|'xl' — scales all 4 layers proportionally. Multipliers: sm=0.35, md=0.6, lg=0.85, xl=1.15
props.intensity: 'soft'|'medium'|'strong' — multiplies opacity of layers 2-4. Values: soft=0.5, medium=0.75, strong=1.0

page_layout_guide._note: EXACT section sequence. Implement in this order in app/page.tsx. Each section is a named Server Component exported from a file in components/ui/ (or inline in page.tsx if small).

items.a: Second Brain is an ambient AI assistant that continuously listens via Bluetooth or microphone, processes your conversations in real-time, and autonomously creates schedules, sends emails, books appointments, and performs web tasks on your behalf.

Second Brain uses on-device speech recognition to capture ambient audio, a fine-tuned LLM extracts intent and action items, then specialized AI agents execute tasks — from booking to emailing to web research — silently and securely. Your raw audio never leaves your device.
Second Brain offers a free tier with core features. Pro and Team plans unlock unlimited agent actions, priority processing, advanced integrations, and dedicated Bluetooth device pairing.

items.q: How does Second Brain protect my privacy?
items.a: All speech-to-text processing happens on-device using local ASR models. Only semantic intent embeddings are ever transmitted — never raw audio or transcripts. All data is end-to-end encrypted at rest and in transit.

MarqueeTrack.duplication: Render items array twice in DOM for seamless loop

CursorDot.mount: Render in app/layout.tsx inside RootLayout body, after children
CursorDot.dot: fixed w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full bg-primary pointer-events-none z-[9999] mix-blend-screen transition-[width,height] duration-150
CursorDot.ring: fixed w-8 h-8 rounded-full border border-primary/45 pointer-events-none z-[9998] transition-transform duration-100
CursorDot.implementation: useEffect with mousemove → update CSS custom props --cx --cy; style={{left:'var(--cx)',top:'var(--cy)',transform:'translate(-50%,-50)'}}
CursorDot.hover_expand: add/remove classes via mouseenter/mouseleave on interactive elements — dot:w-4 h-4, ring:w-12 h-12
CursorDot.touch_hide: hidden on pointer:coarse devices — add className='pointer-fine:block hidden'

motion_variants_file.scroll_reveal_hook_usage: import { useInView } from 'motion/react'; const ref = useRef(null); const inView = useInView(ref, { once: true, margin: '-72px 0px' }); <motion.div ref={ref} variants={staggerContainer} initial='hidden' animate={inView ? 'visible' : 'hidden'}>
motion_variants_file.reduced_motion: import { useReducedMotion } from 'motion/react'; if (prefersReducedMotion) skip transform variants, keep opacity only

exports.AGENTS: 8 agent objects with name/role/status/gradient — for future agents section

structure: import { GeistMono } from 'geist/font/mono' — or however Geist Mono is configured
export const metadata: Metadata = { ... see seo_metadata block ... }

seo_metadata.title: Second Brain — Your Ambient AI Consciousness
seo_metadata.description: Second Brain listens to your conversations, understands your intent, and acts — scheduling, emailing, browsing, and managing your life through a fleet of specialized AI agents.

openGraph.title: Second Brain — Your Ambient AI Consciousness
openGraph.description: The AI that thinks with you, not for you.

dynamic_imports_with_ssr_false: AmbientOrb — ssr:false only if you add JS interactivity; pure CSS version can be SSR
client_components: Any component using motion whileHover/whileTap (wrap with 'use client')
performance_and_build.no_new_dependencies: Do NOT add Three.js, GSAP, or canvas libraries. AmbientOrb is pure CSS. All animations via motion-react (already in project) and CSS keyframes.
performance_and_build.motion_import: Always import from 'motion/react' — NOT 'framer-motion' — for motion-react v11+
performance_and_build.reduced_motion: Wrap all motion.div variants with useReducedMotion() check from 'motion/react'. If true: remove y transforms, keep only opacity transitions. Add motion-safe: prefix to CSS animation classes where possible.
